title: Claude Code just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts presents Claude Code as a system for building responsive websites with an integrated CMS that allows clients to edit content without developer intervention. The workflow combines Claude Code for design generation, Firecrawl for blueprint extraction, MongoDB for backend data storage, Vercel for hosting, and GitHub for version control.
